about.title: Hello,
about.bio1: My name is <highlight>Jean Paulo</highlight> and with more than <highlight>5 years of experience</highlight> as a mobile developer, I have deep knowledge of the Android platform and its development ecosystem.
about.bio2: My technical skills are complemented by my excellent <highlight>soft skills</highlight>, which include active listening, collaboration, support for juniors, resilience and attention to detail.
about.bio3: My purpose is to develop innovative, high-quality apps that meet users' needs and <highlight>positively impact the world.</highlight>
about.bio4: Relevant skills include: <highlight>Android SDK, Java, Kotlin, Flutter, Dart, Python</highlight>

descriptions.1: Android app that searches for music, albums and artists using the iTunes API.
descriptions.2: Android app to consume the FutMarket API, displaying football market data.
descriptions.3: Flutter app displaying characters and episodes from the Rick and Morty universe.
descriptions.4: Android test project for Reign Softwarehouse, showcasing Clean Architecture on Android.

contact.title: Let's talk 🤙
contact.quote: "The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams." – Eleanor Roosevelt

recommendation.title: What devs who worked with me say

messages.yris: "A very focused and critical person, and I believe always very attentive to details. We get along very well at work and I think it is very easy to work with you, no drama and everything straight to the point."
messages.fabio: "Dedication, focus, delivery and relevant questions. I admire your work and I hope you continue seeking to grow."
messages.jessica: "Mastery of Android and has an analytical profile, always pays attention to details before acting. Also very proactive, anticipates situations and brings solutions."
messages.bruna: "Practical and objective. Communicates well and clearly. Has an excellent analytical profile, making good analyses and investigations. Documents things with quality. Has a lot of autonomy and proactivity."
messages.murilo: "Jean is a very competent Android developer, with above-average technical mastery. Reliable, with quality and punctual deliveries, has a calm demeanor that makes the day-to-day easier."
messages.weslley: "Professional, responsible, visionary. Always keep being open to new things. That will always take you to higher levels."

thoughtworks.h1: Leading the re-platforming of the Breathwrk Android app from the ground up, defining architecture and the modern technology stack.
thoughtworks.h2: Establishing engineering standards and best practices for the development team to ensure a scalable and maintainable codebase.
thoughtworks.h3: Applying deep knowledge of the Android ecosystem to deliver a high-performance wellness application.

magalu.h1: Led the refactoring and development of a new advertisement SDK, enabling scalable ad management for internal and external use cases.
magalu.h2: Contributed to significant performance enhancements and bug fixes across the ecosystem, including the Netshoes and Magalu apps.
magalu.h3: Actively monitored app performance and release stability using Firebase and Datadog, ensuring high quality for apps like Netshoes and Magalu.

xp.h1: Played a proactive role in architectural improvements and introducing new features across cross-squad environments.
xp.h2: Actively mentored junior developers, accelerating their technical growth and onboarding in Android development.
xp.h3: Managed the release cycle for major applications (XP, Rico, and Clear) and led War-Rooms to solve critical production issues.

nttdata.h1: Part of the team responsible for capturing and tracking user behavior to drive data-informed business decisions.
nttdata.h2: Significantly improved data quality and accuracy, ensuring reliable tracking of user journeys across the app.
nttdata.h3: Focused on fixing critical bugs and optimizing performance for high-traffic fintech and logistics solutions.

hubxp.h1: Developed and implemented advanced geolocation features for healthcare and education platforms.
hubxp.h2: Served as a key member of a specialized support squad, addressing on-demand tickets and production-critical issues with high agility.
hubxp.h3: Provided guidance to modernize legacy codebases and improve the overall stability and quality of Android applications.

footer.developedBy: Developed with ❤ by Jean Paulo de Almeida Silva
